comment: Expected parse of roundtrip/LIBRARY.md under library-entry.1 + the tolerance reading flagged in lines.jsonl. Quarantine 'error_contains' is a substring assertion; exact wording is the implementation's choice.

entry.title: Fence tracking is load-bearing
entry.lesson: A digit-form example inside a fenced block must not ingest; ingesting one fabricates provenance in an append-only store.
entry.evidence: this fixture's fenced block above shares this entry's id.
entry.falsifier: a contract ruling that fenced lines are entries.

entry.title: Labeled tier parses
entry.lesson: The labeled-tier form is the dominant real-world shape and parses identically to bare tier.
entry.falsifier: strict-bare ruling from the contract owner.

structural_line_count_note: All other lines (preamble, both fenced lines, headers, blanks, trailing prose) produce no records.
